title: caladenia saggicola
intro: Caladenia saggicola, commonly known as the Donkey Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Caladenia saggicola include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
